beats.narration: Finding the indication is the easy half. Now you judge it against acceptance criteria, and they come in three styles.

payload.title: CRITERIA STYLES
payload.sub: The three forms acceptance criteria take — and how to apply each.

beats.narration: Verbal: no cracks, pass or fail. Comparison: match the part to a reference. Size-based: limits you measure.
Size-based criteria force measurement, and the tool must resolve finer than the limit. Checking one millimeter with a whole-millimeter rule is guessing.

payload.heading: Size-based limits force measurement
payload.note: TOOL MUST RESOLVE FINER THAN THE LIMIT

beats.narration: One real paragraph mixes them: no cracks, undercut within a depth limit, texture per the sample board. Evaluate every clause, not just the easiest.
Closing rule: the criteria that count are the ones your contract invokes, by document, edition, and paragraph. You apply them. You don't improvise them.

payload.sub: Apply them as written — never improvise.
